title: Median over temporal domains
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE voyages (id UInt64, departure_date Date, destination String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO voyages (departure_date, destination) VALUES ('1770-01-01', 'London'), ('1770-02-01', 'Paris'), ('1770-03-01', 'New York');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voyages WHERE departure_date IS NULL;
